visual_description: A static, wide shot captures a vintage, dark-colored luxury sedan parked in the middle of a wet city street at night. The audio is filled with a powerful and dramatic orchestral score. The road glistens with reflections from the streetlights, which cast a cool, greenish light over the scene. In the background, the silhouettes of tall, illuminated skyscrapers rise into the dark sky. The car, a classic model, faces the camera, its headlights on. A license plate reading "AY 333" is visible. In the top right corner of the screen, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is present. The music is grand and cinematic, with soaring strings and a slow, deliberate tempo that creates a serious and slightly melancholic atmosphere. The camera cuts to a close-up shot from outside the passenger side of the car, looking in through the window. The reflection of the city lights and the streetlights create a shimmering, distorted pattern on the glass. Inside, the silhouettes of two men are visible. The man in the driver's seat, on the left, is in profile, looking forward. The man in the passenger seat, on the right, is also in profile, looking towards the driver
